answer: The future tense is formed by inserting -wehnayi- into the present tense form, typically before the final consonant. If the present form ends with the plural marker -eɬ, it becomes -wehnayiweɬ in the future. If it ends with -ahaɬ, it becomes -wehnayihaɬ.
